entity.summary: Brazilian centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering BRL and stablecoin spot markets, a broad digital-asset portfolio, order-book trading, mobile access, and related account services.
entity.notes: Current first-party platform presents more than 300 trading pairs, active account and order-book functions, mobile applications, and Brazilian corporate disclosures. Current independent exchange data reports recent BRL and USDT spot markets with non-zero volume. No exact launch date, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: NovaDAX official Brazilian cryptocurrency exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform describes NovaDAX as a Brazilian cryptocurrency exchange, exposes active account and trading entry points, and reports a portfolio of more than 300 trading pairs.

evidence.title: NovaDAX spot markets and trading-volume profile
evidence.notes: Current independent exchange profile lists recently updated BRL and USDT spot markets and non-zero 24-hour trading volume, supporting active classification.
